name: GLM-5V-Turbo
tagline: Multimodal Turbo variant for vision-based coding and agent workflows.
metaDescription: GLM-5V-Turbo (Z.ai (Zhipu / GLM)), released 2026-04-01 — part of the GLM Turbo line. Multimodal Turbo variant for vision-based coding and agent workflows.
overview: GLM-5V-Turbo is a large language model from Z.ai (Zhipu / GLM), part of the GLM Turbo line. Released 2026-04-01. API-served, throughput-optimised variants of the GLM-5 flagship for high-volume agent tasks.
What's notable in this version: Multimodal Turbo variant for vision-based coding and agent workflows.
